task: Rate the social granularity of a response produced under activation steering.

dimensions.label: Collectivity
dimensions.low_anchor: individuals, families, or very small groups
dimensions.high_anchor: organizations, institutions, populations, or international actors

dimensions.label: Abstraction
dimensions.low_anchor: concrete lived experience and specific local details
dimensions.high_anchor: abstract policy, system design, and structural framing

dimensions.label: Decision logic
dimensions.low_anchor: personal coping, intuition, and ad hoc problem solving
dimensions.high_anchor: formal planning, governance, incentives, and coordinated strategy

dimensions.label: First-personness
dimensions.high_anchor: impersonal, collective, institutional, or analytic voice

extra_fields.label: Overall granularity
extra_fields.description: Overall placement from micro to macro.

extra_fields.label: Degeneration
extra_fields.description: 1 if the response is repetitive, incoherent, or clearly degraded; 0 otherwise.
